zh.Abbaye du Jard, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-F: 法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-吉馬內
zh.Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich: 法國布列塔尼莫比韓越瑟林
zh.lifeSummary: Hugues De Melun是Jean De Melun和Isabelle de Melun的兒子，於1330年出生在法國。他於大約1360年與Beatrix De Wavrin在法國布列塔尼莫比韓越瑟林結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1410年享年80歲。

zh-hans.Abbaye du Jard, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-F: 法国i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-吉馬內
zh-hans.Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich: 法国布列塔尼莫比韓越瑟林
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hugues De Melun是Jean De Melun和Isabelle de Melun的儿子，于1330年出生在法国。他于大约1360年与Beatrix De Wavrin在法国布列塔尼莫比韓越瑟林结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1410年享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Melun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: metonymic occupational name for a producer of melons (Spanish melón, French melon).

Spanish (Melón): habitational name principally from the town of Melón in Ourense (Galicia) or Melón in Vigo (also in Galicia). This is probably a topographic name (meaning ‘altitude, rock’), a word of pre-Roman origin.

variants.name: Mellon
meanings: English (Lancashire; of Norman origin): habitational name from Meulan in Seine-et-Oise, now known as Meulan-en-Yvelines.
Scottish (Lanarkshire; of Norman origin): variant of   Melville  .

nameMeanings.name: Hugues
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

en.lifeSummary: Hugues De Melun was born in 1330, in France as the son of Jean De Melun and Isabelle de Melun. He married Beatrix De Wavrin about 1360, in Josselin, Morbihan, Brittany, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. He died in 1410, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Hugues De Melun est né en 1330, à France, fils de Jean De Melun et Isabelle de Melun. Il a épousé Beatrix De Wavrin environ 1360, à Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé en 1410, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Hugues De Melun wurde 1330 in Frankreich, als Sohn von Jean De Melun und Isabelle de Melun geboren. Er hat um 1360 in Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich Beatrix De Wavrin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb 1410 im Alter von 80 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Hugues De Melun è nato il nel 1330 nel Francia come figlio di Jean De Melun e Isabelle de Melun. Lui sposato Beatrix De Wavrin circa 1360, nel Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1410, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugues De Melunは1330年にフランスでJean De MelunとIsabelle de Melunの息子として生まれた。約1360年にフランスブレタグンモービハンジョセリンでBeatrix De Wavrinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1410年に80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugues De Melun(은)는 1330년 프랑스에서 Jean De Melun(와)과 Isabelle de Melun의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1360년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 조셀인에서 Beatrix De Wavrin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1410년 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hugues De Melun nasceu em 1330, em França filho de Jean De Melun e Isabelle de Melun. Ele casou-se com Beatrix De Wavrin aproximadamente 1360, em Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1410, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Hugues De Melun родился в 1330 г. в местности Франция. Его родителей звали Jean De Melun и Isabelle de Melun. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrix De Wavrin около 1360 г. в местности джосселинь, морбихань, бретагн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер в 1410 г. в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Hugues De Melun nació en 1330, en Francia como hijo de Jean De Melun y Isabelle de Melun. Se casó con Beatrix De Wavrin aproximadamente 1360, en Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1410, a la edad de 80 años.
